isProduction.description: Whether this app configuration is a production environment

moduleLoadTimeout.description: Amount of time to wait for a module to load before erroring

loggerLevels.description: Configures which log levels of log should be shown. Accepts generic levels, module-specific levels and not logic (e.g. 'debug', 'debug.core' and '!debug' respectively).

loggerDateFormat.description: The date format to use for log timestamps

loggerShowTimestamp.description: Whether to prepend a timestamp to each log message

defaultLang.description: The default language used by the server
